name: Otte Golf & Family Fun Center
about: Otte Golf & Family Fun Center is a multi-sport recreation facility in Greenwood, IN, offering golf and family entertainment. It features an outdoor 18-hole executive golf course, an 18-hole mini-golf course, a driving range, outdoor batting cages, and 3 pickleball courts. A new indoor facility opening in February 2026 will add Trackman golf simulators and Fungoman batting cages with HitTrax technology. The venue provides lessons from PGA professionals and caters to golfers of all skill levels, as well as families and groups looking for a variety of activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Upcoming indoor facility featuring premium Trackman simulators for advanced practice
Wide range of activities including golf, mini-golf, batting cages, and pickleball
On-site PGA instruction with over 60 years of combined professional experience

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor; new indoor facility opening February 2026

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available for $10. You can also bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify food and drink policies for outside items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The 18-hole executive golf course is designed for golfers of all skill levels, but specific timing is not mentioned.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a 18-hole mini-golf course designed for all ages and is described as a family fun center.
